name: Curtain Rise
description: Theatrical curtain ascending revealing sonic landscape

prompts.label: theatrical curtain rising to reveal expanding sonic landscape
prompts.text: theatrical curtain rising to reveal expanding sonic landscape, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: heavy drape lifting with building orchestral anticipation
prompts.text: heavy drape lifting with building orchestral anticipation, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: velvet barrier ascending with growing atmospheric wash
prompts.text: velvet barrier ascending with growing atmospheric wash, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: performance space opening up with widening reverb field
prompts.text: performance space opening up with widening reverb field, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: stage reveal with lights and atmosphere expanding together
prompts.text: stage reveal with lights and atmosphere expanding together, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
